scripts.dev: powershell -Command "if (Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Stopping existing Node processes...'; Get-Process -Name node | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; node --watch src/index.js"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill-port && npm run dev
scripts.dev:safe: powershell -Command "if (Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host 'Stopping existing Node processes...'; Get-Process -Name node | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; npm run dev"
